mapper.insert: INSERT INTO notification (receiver_email, type, target_id, is_read, created_at) VALUES (#{receiverEmail}, #{type}, #{targetId}, false, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM notification WHERE receiver_email = #{receiverEmail} ORDER BY notification_id DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE notification SET is_read = true WHERE receiver_email = #{receiverEmail} AND target_id = #{contractId} AND type IN ( 'CHAT', 'CONFIRM_FILE', 'CONTRACT_CANCEL_REQUEST', 'CONTRACT_COMPLETED', 'CONTRACT_COMPLETED_PENDING' )
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM notification WHERE receiver_email = #{receiverEmail} AND is_read = false
